creator: amdmi3@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Could you please send a patch (as a patch)? Also, from a quick glance, 
${INSTALL_PROGRAM} in regression-test is incorrect (it's target, not a 
command); GETTEXT handling is likely incorrect too (what happens if NLS 
is off, but gettext is present).
